### 🧪 Concept Summary
Provide the high level vision for this research or product idea. 

### 📊 Tech Stack Analysis
• Suggested libraries / frameworks.
• Compatibility with the current Google Antigravity / Gemini stack.
• Resource requirements (Compute / Storage / API credits).

### 🚦 Go / No-Go Signals
What are the success metrics for this idea? At what point should we pivot or stop development if the results aren't scaling?

### 💰 Monetization / Value Add
If this is a physical or tech product idea / how does it generate value? Does it solve a problem people didn't have a solution for before?
